feed.title: Huanyue's Blog
feed.subtitle: Do not go gentle into that good night

entry.title: 题解 P6195 [EER1]迫害
entry.content:
题目链接

证明

假设我们现有的数最多能表示出[1,k][1,k][1,k]内所有的整数

增加一个数,使得之后得k′k'k′最大.

设这个数为ttt

∵ [1,k][1,k][1,k]之间的整数都可以表示出来

∴ t+1,t+2,t+3.....t+k−1,t+jt+1,t+2,t+3.....t+k-1,t+jt+1,t+2,t+3.....t+k−1,t+j即[t+1,t+k+1][t+1,t+k+1][t+1,t+k+1]间得整数都可以表示

∵要令区间连续

∴t+1≤k+1t+1\leq k+1t+1≤k+1

t≤kt\leq kt≤k

又∵要令k′k'k′最大

∴要令t+k+1t+k+1t+k+1最大

t=kt=kt=k时t+k+1t+k+1t+k+1最大,此时能表现出得区间为[1,2k+1][1,2k+1][1,2k+1]

结论: 每次新增一个数可以让原有数表示出的区间大小×2+1\times 2 +1×2+1

那么问题就简化成这样了:

f(x)=f(x−1)×2+1,f(1)=nf(x)=f(x-1)\times2+1,f(1)=nf(x)=f(x−1)×2+1,f(1)=n

求f(m)f(m)f(m)

如果你学过数学必修五的数列,那么这就是个简单的数列问题了,求出通项式即可.

不要问我为什么不写数列证明,我还们学到数列.

如果没学过,我手把手教你

下面给出两种较为简单的证明

当时的我:

f(1)=nf(1)=nf(1)=n

f(2)=2n+1f(2)=2n+1f(2)=2n+1

f(3)=4n+3f(3)=4n+3f(3)=4n+3

f(4)=8n+7f(4)=8n+7f(4)=8n+7

......

哦,这不就是(n+1)×2m−1(n+1)\times 2^m-1(n+1)×2m−1

归纳法一推,正确性确认,

考后的我(这种证明颇为有趣,但也有一定知识要求):

巧妙的利用二进制

×2+1\times 2+1×2+1相当于二进制中的<<1∣1<<1|1<<1∣1

例如(D 表示 十进制 B 表示二进制):

10D=1010B10D=1010B10D=1010B

10D×2+1=21D=10101B10D \times 2 +1 =21D =10101B10D×2+1=21D=10101B

简单的来说,就是在二进制码的最后面塞一个111

那么我们要将n×2+1 mn\times 2 +1\ mn×2+1 m次,相当于在二进制码后面塞了mmm个111

这mmm个111的和是20+21+22+...+2m−2+2m−1=2m−12^0+2^1+2^2+...+2^{m-2}+2^{m-1}=2^{m}-120+21+22+...+2m−2+2m−1=2m−1

我们nnn左移了mmm位,也就是×2m\times 2^m×2m

那么结果为n×2m+2m−1=(n+1)×2m−1n \times 2^m+2^m-1=(n+1)\times 2^m-1n×2m+2m−1=(n+1)×2m−1

大功告成,最后用一个快速幂解决

如果你不会快速幂,请移步至这里

下面贴上代码

#include <iostream>
#include <cstdio>

typedef long long ll;
using namespace std;
const int mod = 1000000007;

inline int read()
{
    int x = 0, f = 1;
    char ch = getchar();
    while (ch < '0' || ch > '9')
    {
        if (ch == '-')
            f = -1;
        ch = getchar();
    }
    while (ch >= '0' && ch <= '9')
    {
        x = ((x << 3) + (x << 1) + (ch ^ 48));
        ch = getchar();
    }
    return x * f;
}
ll qpow(int b)
{
    ll ans = 1, res = 2;
    while (b)
    {
        if (b & 1)
            ans = ans * res % mod;
        res = res * res % mod;
        b >>= 1;
    }
    return ans % mod;
}

int main()
{
    cout << ((read() + 1) * qpow(read()) - 1) % mod;
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 题解 P1027 Car的旅行路线
entry.content:
点乘得到直角推出第四个点,
建图:
城市内 铁路费用×\times×距离
不同城市 距离×\times×单位费用
然后以起点城市的四个点跑四遍最短路.
再从终点城市四个点找到最小值.

/*
 * @Author: Huanyue 
 * @Date: 2020-03-07 21:58:28 
 * @Last Modified by:   Huanyue 
 * @Last Modified time: 2020-03-07 21:58:28 
 */

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <cmath>
#include <iostream>
#include <queue>
#define ri register int
using namespace std;

const int MAXN = 160020;
const double INF = 1e18;
int tz, n, m, s, t, u[MAXN], v[MAXN], fst[MAXN], nxt[MAXN];
double wf, x[MAXN], y[MAXN], wt[MAXN], w[MAXN], fm[10], fz[10], nowx[10], nowy[10], dis[MAXN], ans;
bool book[MAXN];

double dist(int a, int b)
{
    return sqrt((x[a] - x[b]) * (x[a] - x[b]) + (y[a] - y[b]) * (y[a] - y[b]));
}

void clean()
{
    m = 0, ans = INF;
    memset(fst, 0, sizeof(fst));
    memset(nxt, 0, sizeof(nxt));
    memset(book, 0, sizeof(book));
}

struct node
{
    int num;
    double c;
};
priority_queue<node> Q;
bool operator<(const node &a, const node &b)
{
    return a.c > b.c;
}

void Dijkstra(int s)
{
    memset(book, 0, sizeof(book));
    for (ri i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        dis[i] = INF;
    dis[s] = 0;
    Q.push((node){s, 0});
    while (!Q.empty())
    {
        int nowx = Q.top().num;
        Q.pop();
        if (book[nowx])
            continue;
        book[nowx] = 1;
        for (ri k = fst[nowx]; k > 0; k = nxt[k])
        {
            if (dis[v[k]] > dis[u[k]] + w[k])
            {
                dis[v[k]] = dis[u[k]] + w[k];
                Q.push((node){v[k], dis[v[k]]});
            }
        }
    }
}

void mathmatic(int num)
{
    for (ri i = 1; i <= 3; i++)
    {
        int cnt = 0;
        for (ri j = 1; j <= 3; j++)
        {
            if (j == i)
                continue;
            cnt++;
            fm[cnt] = x[(num - 1) * 4 + i] - x[(num - 1) * 4 + j], nowx[cnt] = x[(num - 1) * 4 + j];
            fz[cnt] = y[(num - 1) * 4 + i] - y[(num - 1) * 4 + j], nowy[cnt] = y[(num - 1) * 4 + j];
        }
        if ((fm[1] == 0 && fz[2] == 0) || (fm[2] == 0 && fz[1] == 0))
        {
            double lx = x[(num - 1) * 4 + i] - nowx[1], ly = y[(num - 1) * 4 + i] - nowy[1];
            x[num * 4] = nowx[2] - lx, y[num * 4] = nowy[2] - ly;
            break;
        }
        if ((fm[1] * fm[2]) / (fz[1] * fz[2]) == -1)
        {
            double lx = x[(num - 1) * 4 + i] - nowx[1], ly = y[(num - 1) * 4 + i] - nowy[1];
            x[num * 4] = nowx[2] - lx, y[num * 4] = nowy[2] - ly;
            break;
        }
    }
}

void build()
{
    for (ri i = 1; i <= n * 4; i++)
        for (ri j = 1; j <= n * 4; j++)
        {
            ++m;
            u[m] = i, v[m] = j;
            if ((i - 1) - (i - 1) % 4 == (j - 1) - (j - 1) % 4)
                w[m] = dist(i, j) * wt[i];
            else
                w[m] = dist(i, j) * wf;
            nxt[m] = fst[u[m]], fst[u[m]] = m;
        }
}

void work()
{
    clean();
    scanf("%d%lf%d%d", &n, &wf, &s, &t);
    for (ri i = 1; i <= n; i++)
    {
        for (ri j = 1; j <= 3; j++)
            scanf("%lf%lf", &x[(i - 1) * 4 + j], &y[(i - 1) * 4 + j]);
        scanf("%lf", &wt[(i - 1) * 4 + 1]);
        for (ri j = 2; j <= 4; j++)
            wt[(i - 1) * 4 + j] = wt[(i - 1) * 4 + 1];
        mathmatic(i);
    }
    build();
    n *= 4;
    for (ri i = 1; i <= 4; i++)
    {
        Dijkstra((s - 1) * 4 + i);
        for (ri j = 1; j <= 4; j++)
            ans = min(ans, dis[(t - 1) * 4 + j]);
    }
    printf("%.1f", floor(ans * 10 + 0.5) / 10);
}

int main()
{
    scanf("%d", &tz);
    for (ri i = 1; i <= tz; i++)
        work();
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 题解 P1026 统计单词个数
entry.content:
dp[i][j]dp[i][j]dp[i][j]表示1 i1~i1 i之间jjj块的最大数.
预处理sum[i][j]sum[i][j]sum[i][j]表示[i,j][i,j][i,j]的单词数

/*
 * @Author: Huanyue 
 * @Date: 2020-03-07 15:45:28 
 * @Last Modified by: Huanyue
 * @Last Modified time: 2020-03-07 15:46:13
 */
#include <iostream>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <string>
using namespace std;
int p, n, m, k, dp[210][50], sum[210][210];
string s, a[10];
inline int read()
{
    int date = 0, w = 1;
    char c = 0;
    while (c < '0' || c > '9')
    {
        if (c == '-')
            w = -1;
        c = getchar();
    }
    while (c >= '0' && c <= '9')
    {
        date = date * 10 + c - '0';
        c = getchar();
    }
    return date * w;
}
bool check(int l, int r)
{
    string x = s.substr(l, r - l + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        if (x.find(a[i]) == 0)
            return true;
    return false;
}
int main()
{
    string ch;
    s += '0';
    p = read();
    k = read();
    for (int i = 1; i <= p; i++)
    {
        cin >> ch;
        s += ch;
    }
    n = read();
    m = s.length() - 1;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        cin >> a[i];
    for (int i = m; i >= 1; i--)
        for (int j = i; j >= 1; j--)
        {
            sum[j][i] = sum[j + 1][i];
            if (check(j, i))
                sum[j][i]++;
        }
    dp[0][0] = 0;
    for (int i = 1; i <= k; i++)
        dp[i][i] = dp[i - 1][i - 1] + sum[i][i];
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
        dp[i][1] = sum[1][i];
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
        for (int j = 1; j <= k && j < i; j++)
            for (int l = j; l < i; l++)
                dp[i][j] = max(dp[i][j], dp[l][j - 1] + sum[l + 1][i]); //转移
    printf("%d\n", dp[m][k]);
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 题解 P2296 寻找道路
entry.content:
题目链接

这道题还是比较简单的

反向建边,终点bfs,据题意删除所有无法到达的点

从起点bfs找最短路,没了

这道题细节还是比较多

队列类模板+vector存图

/*
 * @Author: Huanyue 
 * @Date: 2020-03-06 17:42:39 
 * @Last Modified by: Huanyue
 * @Last Modified time: 2020-03-06 19:27:38
 */

#include <iostream>
#include <cstdio>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstring>
#include <queue>
#include <utility>
#include <vector>
#define rgi register
typedef long long ll;
typedef unsigned long long ull;
using namespace std;

inline void write(register int x)
{
    if (x < 0)
    {
        putchar('-'), x = -x;
    }
    if (x >= 10)
    {
        write(x / 10);
    }
    putchar('0' + x % 10);
}

inline int read()
{
    int x = 0, f = 1;
    char ch = getchar();
    while (ch < '0' || ch > '9')
    {
        if (ch == '-')
            f = -1;
        ch = getchar();
    }
    while (ch >= '0' && ch <= '9')
    {
        x = ((x << 3) + (x << 1) + (ch ^ 48));
        ch = getchar();
    }
    return x * f;
}
const int N = 10010, M = 200010;

vector<int> g[N], _g[N];
bool can[N], Can[N];
int dis[N];

const int QueueLen = 1e5;
const int Error_Number = -1; //队列长度
template <class T>
class Queue //最普通的队列
{
public:
    T Q[QueueLen];
    int head, tail;
    Queue()
    {
        head = tail = 0;
    }
    bool full();
    bool empty();
    void push(T x);
    void pop();
    T front();
};

template <class T>
bool Queue<T>::full()
{
    if (tail == QueueLen)
        return 1;
    return 0;
}

template <class T>
bool Queue<T>::empty()
{
    if (head == tail)
        return true;
    return false;
}

template <class T> //tail空
void Queue<T>::push(T x)
{
    if (full())
        return;
    Q[tail++] = x;
}

template <class T>
void Queue<T>::pop()
{
    if (empty())
        return;
    head++;
}

template <class T>
T Queue<T>::front() //队首
{
    if (empty())
        return Error_Number;
    return Q[head];
}
int main()
{
    int n = read(), m = read();
    for (rgi int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
    {
        int u = read(), v = read();
        g[u].push_back(v);
        _g[v].push_back(u);
    }
    int s = read(), t = read();
    can[t] = 1;
    Queue<int> q;
    q.push(t);
    while (!q.empty())
    {
        int now = q.front();
        q.pop();
        for (vector<int>::iterator iter = _g[now].begin(); iter != _g[now].end(); iter++)
        {
            if (!can[*iter])
            {
                q.push(*iter);
                can[*iter] = 1;
            }
        }
    }
    if (!can[s])
    {
        puts("-1");
        return 0;
    }
    // cout << "!!!";
    for (rgi int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
    {
        if (can[i])
        {
            Can[i] = 1;
            for (vector<int>::iterator iter = g[i].begin(); iter != g[i].end(); iter++)
            {
                if (!can[*iter])
                {
                    Can[i] = 0;
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    if (!Can[s])
    {
        puts("-1");
        return 0;
    }
    // cout << "!!!";
    dis[s] = 1;
    q.push(s);
    while (!q.empty())
    {
        int now = q.front();
        q.pop();
        if (now == t)
        {
            cout << dis[t] - 1;
            return 0;
        }
        for (vector<int>::iterator iter = g[now].begin(); iter != g[now].end(); iter++)
        {
            if (Can[*iter] && !dis[*iter])
            {
                dis[*iter] = dis[now] + 1;
                q.push(*iter);
            }
        }
    }
    cout << "-1";
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 题解 P1541 乌龟棋
entry.content:
题目链接

要么dp,要么搜索

个人喜欢dp

状态设计: f[a][b][c][d]f[a][b][c][d]f[a][b][c][d]表示用了aaa张111,bbb张222,ccc张333,ddd张444的最大得分.

显然,这个状态是无后效性的,因此可以dp.

初始状态:

f[0][0][0][0]=a1f[0][0][0][0]=a_1f[0][0][0][0]=a1​

其余初始化为000

设k=a×1+b×2+c×3+d×4+1k=a\times 1+b\times2+c\times3+d\times4+1k=a×1+b×2+c×3+d×4+1

转移方程

f[a][b][c][d]=max(f[a][b][c][d],f[a−1][b][c][d]+ak)f[a][b][c][d]=max(f[a][b][c][d],f[a-1][b][c][d]+a_k)f[a][b][c][d]=max(f[a][b][c][d],f[a−1][b][c][d]+ak​)

同理

f[a][b][c][d]=max(f[a][b][c][d],f[a][b−1][c][d]+ak)f[a][b][c][d]=max(f[a][b][c][d],f[a][b-1][c][d]+a_k)f[a][b][c][d]=max(f[a][b][c][d],f[a][b−1][c][d]+ak​)

f[a][b][c][d]=max(f[a][b][c][d],f[a][b][c−1][d]+ak)f[a][b][c][d]=max(f[a][b][c][d],f[a][b][c-1][d]+a_k)f[a][b][c][d]=max(f[a][b][c][d],f[a][b][c−1][d]+ak​)

f[a][b][c][d]=max(f[a][b][c][d],f[a][b][c][d−1]+ak)f[a][b][c][d]=max(f[a][b][c][d],f[a][b][c][d-1]+a_k)f[a][b][c][d]=max(f[a][b][c][d],f[a][b][c][d−1]+ak​)

/*
 * @Author: Huanyue 
 * @Date: 2020-03-06 17:07:36 
 * @Last Modified by: Huanyue
 * @Last Modified time: 2020-03-06 17:08:17
 */
#include <iostream>
#include <cstdio>
#include <string>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cmath>
#include <cstdlib>

using namespace std;

int n, m;
int pan[355], card[5], dp[45][45][45][45];

int main()
{
    scanf("%d%d", &n, &m);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        scanf("%d", &pan[i]);
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
    {
        int k;
        scanf("%d", &k);
        card[k]++;
    }

    dp[0][0][0][0] = pan[1];

    for (int i = 0; i <= card[1]; i++)
        for (int j = 0; j <= card[2]; j++)
            for (int k = 0; k <= card[3]; k++)
                for (int l = 0; l <= card[4]; l++)
                {
                    int pos = 1 + i * 1 + j * 2 + k * 3 + l * 4;
                    if (i)
                        dp[i][j][k][l] = max(dp[i][j][k][l], dp[i - 1][j][k][l] + pan[pos]);
                    if (j)
                        dp[i][j][k][l] = max(dp[i][j][k][l], dp[i][j - 1][k][l] + pan[pos]);
                    if (k)
                        dp[i][j][k][l] = max(dp[i][j][k][l], dp[i][j][k - 1][l] + pan[pos]);
                    if (l)
                        dp[i][j][k][l] = max(dp[i][j][k][l], dp[i][j][k][l - 1] + pan[pos]);
                }

    printf("%d\n", dp[card[1]][card[2]][card[3]][card[4]]);

    return 0;
}

entry.title: 题解 P1351 联合权值
entry.content:
显然的,这个图是一颗无根树

边权为一,说明这两个点之间有一个中结点,我们可以通过枚举中结点来实现计算.

计算时,不能枚举两个结点.

我们要计算

∑i=1total∑j=1total2×i×j\Large \sum \limits ^{total}_{i=1} \sum \limits ^{total} _ {j=1} 2 \times i \times ji=1∑total​j=1∑total​2×i×j

考虑如何转化,回想完全平方

(a+b)2=a2+b2+2ab(a+b)^2=a^2+b^2+2ab(a+b)2=a2+b2+2ab

对于nnn项有
∑i=1n∑j=1n2×i×j+∑i=1ni2=(∑i=1ni)2\Large{ \sum \limits ^{n}_{i=1} \sum \limits ^{n} _ {j=1} 2 \times i \times j+\sum \limits ^ {n} _ {i=1}i^2= (\sum \limits _{i=1} ^ {n} i)^2 }i=1∑n​j=1∑n​2×i×j+i=1∑n​i2=(i=1∑n​i)2

那么移项之后,可以发现,联合权值等于和的平方 −-− 平方和

最大权值只要找到最大的两个的两个权值就行了

/*
 * @Author: Huanyue 
 * @Date: 2020-03-06 15:48:36 
 * @Last Modified by:   Huanyue 
 * @Last Modified time: 2020-03-06 15:48:36 
 */
#include <cstdio>
using namespace std;
struct edge
{
    int next;
    int to;
} a[400005];
int edgenum, head[200005], w[200005];
int n, ans, maxx;
void add(int u, int v)
{
    a[++edgenum].next = head[u];
    a[edgenum].to = v;
    head[u] = edgenum;
}
int main()
{
    scanf("%d", &n);
    for (int i = 1; i < n; i++)
    {
        int u, v;
        scanf("%d%d", &u, &v);
        add(u, v);
        add(v, u);
    }
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        scanf("%d", &w[i]);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
    {
        int max1 = 0, max2 = 0;
        int t1 = 0, t2 = 0;
        for (int j = head[i]; j; j = a[j].next)
        {
            if (w[a[j].to] > max1)
                max2 = max1, max1 = w[a[j].to];
            else if (w[a[j].to] > max2)
                max2 = w[a[j].to];
            t1 = (t1 + w[a[j].to]) % 10007;
            t2 = (t2 + w[a[j].to] * w[a[j].to]) % 10007;
        }
        t1 = t1 * t1 % 10007;
        ans = (ans + t1 + 10007 - t2) % 10007;
        if (maxx < max1 * max2)
            maxx = max1 * max2;
    }
    printf("%d %d\n", maxx, ans);
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 题解 P1311 选择客栈
entry.content:
O(n2)O(n^2)O(n2)做法明显,枚举l,rl,rl,r

方案数与中间合法的咖啡店数量无关,只要求有就行了.

对于一个客栈,

它对答案的贡献 = 左边合法数量+右边合法数量.

并且具有一个性质,

统计客栈rrr的贡献,如果客栈lll合法,那么≤l\leq l≤l的同色客栈必然合法.

那么就可以考虑用递推解决了.

记录一个左边最近的合法咖啡店qqq

如果扫到的咖啡店合法,更新ttt,并从上一个ttt暴力更新各个颜色的数量.

然后统计答案,就完了

/*
 * @Author: Huanyue 
 * @Date: 2020-03-06 13:34:26 
 * @Last Modified by:   Huanyue 
 * @Last Modified time: 2020-03-06 13:34:26 
 */

#include <iostream>
#include <cstdio>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstring>
#include <queue>
#include <utility>
#include <vector>
#define rgi register
typedef long long ll;
typedef unsigned long long ull;
using namespace std;

const int N = 1e5 + 10;
const int inf = 0x3f3f3f3f;

inline void write(register int x)
{
    if (x < 0)
    {
        putchar('-'), x = -x;
    }
    if (x >= 10)
    {
        write(x / 10);
    }
    putchar('0' + x % 10);
}

inline int read()
{
    int x = 0, f = 1;
    char ch = getchar();
    while (ch < '0' || ch > '9')
    {
        if (ch == '-')
            f = -1;
        ch = getchar();
    }
    while (ch >= '0' && ch <= '9')
    {
        x = ((x << 3) + (x << 1) + (ch ^ 48));
        ch = getchar();
    }
    return x * f;
}

int n, k, p, t, ans, price, num[110], color[200100];
int main()
{
    n = read(), k = read(), p = read();
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
    {
        color[i] = read(), price = read();
        if (price <= p)
        {
            for (int j = i; j > t; j--)
                num[color[j]]++;
            t = i, ans += num[color[i]] - 1;
        }
        else
            ans += num[color[i]];
    }
    write(ans);
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 题解 P1040 加分二叉树
entry.content:
题目链接

显然,中序遍历是 左 根 右 的顺序

因此,如果第iii号元素是[l,r][l,r][l,r]的根,那么iii左边的数构成了其左子树,右边的数构成了其右子树

具体的,设f[l][r]f[l][r]f[l][r]表示[l,r][l,r][l,r]构成子树的最大加分,设rootrootroot表示示最大加分时[l,r][l,r][l,r]的根节点.

那么显然有f[l][r]f[l][r]f[l][r]=f[l][root−1]∗f[root+1][r]+v[root]f[l][root-1]*f[root+1][r]+v[root]f[l][root−1]∗f[root+1][r]+v[root]

这就像区间dp,满足一个大区间由小区间转移过来.

首先,初始状态f[i][i]=v[i]f[i][i]=v[i]f[i][i]=v[i]

1.枚举区间长度(从小到大)

2.枚举区间左节点

3.枚举断点

4.取max,记录root

/*
 * @Author: Huanyue 
 * @Date: 2020-03-04 17:05:31 
 * @Last Modified by: Huanyue
 * @Last Modified time: 2020-03-05 16:37:37
 */

#include <iostream>
#include <cstdio>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstring>
#include <queue>
#include <utility>
#include <vector>
#define rgi register
typedef long long ll;
typedef unsigned long long ull;
using namespace std;

const int N = 50;
const int inf = 0x3f3f3f3f;

inline void write(register int x)
{
    if (x < 0)
    {
        putchar('-'), x = -x;
    }
    if (x >= 10)
    {
        write(x / 10);
    }
    putchar('0' + x % 10);
}

inline int read()
{
    int x = 0, f = 1;
    char ch = getchar();
    while (ch < '0' || ch > '9')
    {
        if (ch == '-')
            f = -1;
        ch = getchar();
    }
    while (ch >= '0' && ch <= '9')
    {
        x = ((x << 3) + (x << 1) + (ch ^ 48));
        ch = getchar();
    }
    return x * f;
}

int n, v[39], f[47][47], i, j, k, root[49][49];
void print(int l, int r)
{
    if (l > r)
        return;
    if (l == r)
    {
        write(l);
        putchar(' ');
        return;
    }
    write(root[l][r]);
    putchar(' ');
    print(l, root[l][r] - 1);
    print(root[l][r] + 1, r);
}
int main()
{
    n = read();
    for (i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        v[i] = read();
    for (i = 1; i <= n; i++)
    {
        f[i][i] = v[i];
        f[i][i - 1] = 1;
    }
    for (i = n; i >= 1; i--)
        for (j = i + 1; j <= n; j++)
            for (k = i; k <= j; k++)
            {
                if (f[i][j] < (f[i][k - 1] * f[k + 1][j] + f[k][k]))
                {
                    f[i][j] = f[i][k - 1] * f[k + 1][j] + f[k][k];
                    root[i][j] = k;
                }
            }
    write(f[1][n]);
    putchar('\n');
    print(1, n);
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 小黑语录
entry.content:
第六次更新2020/3/7

下面语录

1.洗脑社创始人



2.切题=切菜






3.文化课奆佬





3.难免也有憨憨的时候






4.杂七杂八









出品:Huanyue 鸣谢BF,小黑AWM提供素材

提供素材,请QQ联系810257987

entry.title: 题解 P4857 [PA2013]Konduktorzy
entry.content:
题目链接

如果你是看到能够继续检票无法理解,所以戳进了题解,

这个根本没用,实际就是向前走.可以回去再思考一下

读完题,不看数据范围,你一定会认为这是憨憨的优先队列模拟

当你地看到n≤2∗1013n \leq 2*10^{13}n≤2∗1013,嗯,有意思.

仔细思索后,你点击了 查看题解 看到了这段文字

如果n≤105n \leq 10^5n≤105,用优先队列是轻松跑过的,

但仔细想一下,对于在最后一段之前的模拟,都是没有必要的

k≤105k\leq 10^5k≤105 那么用O(nlogn)O(n log n)O(nlogn)是可以接受的,

那么假设所有检票员都走到了位置XXX,有

step=∑i=1k⌊x/ai⌋step=\sum^{k}_{i=1}\lfloor x/a_i\rfloorstep=∑i=1k​⌊x/ai​⌋

如果step<nstep<nstep<n说明所有检票员都尽量走到XXX,并且还有没用完指令

我们可以二分满足step≤nstep\leq nstep≤n的最大XXX,

再将XXX适当前推,计算出一个所有人在的位置.

再计算出走到这个位置所花的步数,与nnn相减.

剩下的交给堆模拟

/*
 * @Author: Huanyue 
 * @Date: 2020-02-15 10:48:32 
 * @Last Modified by: Huanyue
 * @Last Modified time: 2020-02-15 10:51:16
 */
#include <iostream>
#include <cstdio>
#define MAXN 100005
#define LL long long int
#define max(a, b) ((a) > (b) ? (a) : (b))
#define min(a, b) ((a) < (b) ? (a) : (b))
using namespace std;

int n, num[MAXN];
LL m, l, r, mid, temp, ans[MAXN];

inline bool check(LL mid)
{
    LL t = m;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i)
    {
        t -= mid / num[i];
        if (t < 0)
            return 0;
    }
    return 1;
}

int mv[MAXN + MAXN];
LL cnt[MAXN];
inline void pushup(int &p)
{
    int &r = mv[p];
    r = p;
    if (cnt[mv[p << 1]] < cnt[r] || cnt[mv[p << 1]] == cnt[r] && mv[p << 1] < r)
        r = mv[p << 1];
    if (cnt[mv[p << 1 | 1]] < cnt[r] || cnt[mv[p << 1 | 1]] == cnt[r] && mv[p << 1 | 1] < r)
        r = mv[p << 1 | 1];
}

void update(int u, LL d)
{
    if (d < cnt[u])
        return;
    cnt[u] = d;
    for (; u; u >>= 1)
        pushup(u);
}

char w;
inline void GET(int &t)
{
    do
        w = getchar();
    while (w < '0' || w > '9');
    do
    {
        t = t * 10 + w - '0';
        w = getchar();
    } while (w >= '0' && w <= '9');
}

int main()
{
    cnt[0] = 9223372036854775807ll;
    scanf("%lld", &m), GET(n);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i)
        GET(num[i]), l = max(l, num[i]);
    r = l * m, ++l;
    while (l <= r)
    {
        mid = (l + r) / 2;
        if (check(mid))
            temp = mid, l = mid + 1;
        else
            r = mid - 1;
    }

    LL t = temp;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n && t; ++i)
        t = min(t, max((temp / num[i] - 1) * num[i], 0));
    LL used = 0;
    int tmp;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i)
    {
        used += t / num[i];
        update(i, t / num[i] * num[i]);
    }
    while (used < m)
    {
        tmp = mv[1];
        ans[tmp] = ++used;
        update(tmp, cnt[tmp] + num[tmp]);
    }
    for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i)
        printf("%lld ", ans[i]);
    printf("%lld\n", ans[n]);
    return 0;
}
